summary: The complete source domain contains only the 50 scalar inputs from 1 through 50, and the stars-and-bars closed form evaluates a fixed four-factor expression, so this domain cannot support an honest asymptotic runtime trend.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 1 through 50

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference evaluates C(n+4,4) with four additions, three multiplications, and one integer division for every legal n.
Regression checks all 50 legal n values against an independent five-state dynamic program.
